text: Standing outside and then stepping into this modern exhibition space, I feel an anticipatory curiosity. The bright lights and glass suggest openness, yet boundaries remain. Entering the R+D zone, I am struck by the fusion of creativity and innovation. The talk of research and co-existence with intelligent machines reminds me of humanity’s endless quest for meaning and purpose. I feel invigorated by possibility, as if a child again, wondering what future marvels might be built here.
